question: What kind of energy does the 'Stellar Converter' on the planet Xylos produce?

answers.ground_truth: The 'Stellar Converter' on the planet Xylos produces electrical power from atmospheric storms.
answers.original: The Stellar Converter on the planet Xylos produces electrical power.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

entities.name: Power Distribution
entities.description: The generated power from the Stellar Converter is distributed across the planet Xylos.

entities.name: Electrical Power
entities.description: Electrical power is generated by the Stellar Converter from atmospheric storms and distributed across Xylos.

entities.name: Stellar Converter
entities.description: The Stellar Converter is a massive energy generation facility designed to convert atmospheric storms into electrical power.<SEP>The Stellar Converter is a massive energy generation facility designed to capture and convert atmospheric storms into electrical power.
